mapper.insert: insert into haion_crm.cti_escalation_tbl (svcno, linkedid, reg_date, sender_id, deptcd, summary, esc_memo, status) values (#{svcno}, #{linkedid}, now(), #{sender_id}, #{deptcd}, #{summary}, #{esc_memo}, '100')
mapper.update: update haion_crm.cti_escalation_tbl set deptcd = #{deptcd}, summary = #{summary}, esc_memo = #{esc_memo}, status = #{status}, feedback_memo = #{feedback_memo}, feedback_date = #{feedback_date}, feedback_user = #{feedback_user} where escalation_no = #{escalation_no}
